children.heading: Covered State
children.label: 2 Covered State
children.text: The term “covered State” means each of the States of California, Louisiana, Oregon, Pennsylvania, South Carolina, South Dakota, Texas, and Washington.

children.heading: Transition payments
children.label: b Transition payments
children.text: For each of fiscal years 2008 through 2010, in lieu of the payment amounts that otherwise would have been made under paragraphs (1)(B) and (2)(B) of , the Secretary of the Treasury shall pay the adjusted amount to each covered State and the eligible counties within the covered State, as applicable.section 7112(a) of this title

children.heading: Distribution of adjusted amount
children.label: c Distribution of adjusted amount
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (d), it is the intent of Congress that the method of distributing the payments under subsection (b) among the counties in the covered States for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2010 be in the same proportion that the payments were distributed to the eligible counties in fiscal year 2006.

children.heading: Distribution of payments in California
children.label: d Distribution of payments in California

children.text: Payments to the State of California under subsection (b).
The shares of the eligible counties of the State payment for California under for each of fiscal years 2011 through 2015 and for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2026.section 7112 of this title

children.heading: Treatment of payments
children.label: e Treatment of payments
children.text: For purposes of this chapter, any payment made under subsection (b) shall be considered to be a payment made under .section 7112(a) of this title
